transcript:
CALLER: Uh hello. I was just wondering, do you have a blood bank or do you only do routine tests?
AGENT: We have a NABL-accredited pathology lab that handles all routine and many specialised blood tests. However, we do not have a blood bank in-house. For blood transfusion requirements, we coordinate with authorised blood banks in the city.
CALLER: Okay. What about 24-hour lab services?
AGENT: Our main lab runs from 7 AM to 9 PM on weekdays. For emergency labs after hours, we have a reduced panel of critical tests available through our emergency department.
CALLER: That makes sense. And sample collection at home — do you offer that?
AGENT: Yes! We have a home sample collection service available within a 10-kilometre radius. You can book it on our app or by calling this number.
CALLER: Wonderful. That's all I needed to know.
AGENT: Glad I could help! Have a good day.
